sections.paragraph:
παράθυρος, ου, ἡ (since PMichZen 38, 11 [III b.c.] side entrance ἐλθὼν κατὰ τὴν παράθυρον τοῦ σταδίου the lion approached the side door of the arena AcPl Ha 2, 5.—S. DELG s.v. θύρα.

PMichZen PMichZen = Zenon Papyri in the Univ. of Michigan Collection—List 4

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 764
